name: T Squared Tees & Taps
about: T Squared Tees & Taps is a golf simulator lounge with both indoor and outdoor facilities. They offer a full-service bar and restaurant alongside their high-end golf simulators. The venue caters to both casual players and serious golfers, with options for group events, private parties, and individual practice sessions. Their pricing is based on hourly bay rental, with various time slots available to accommodate different needs, from quick 9-hole sessions to full 18-hole rounds.
why_golfers_like_it: Top-of-the-line Foresight golf simulators with 16ft screens
Over 75 golf courses to choose from
Spacious and clean facilities with plenty of parking
Full-service food and drink menu available while playing
Heated outdoor patio and bar/lounge space for events

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen offering fresh seafood, appetizers, salads, and specialties like filet mignon. Menu evolves with the seasons.
Full bar with rotating draft offerings, wine, and cocktails. BYOB is not mentioned.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The provided information does not specify whether club rentals are available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: BYOB is not mentioned; the venue has a full kitchen and bar available for on-site food and drink purchases.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time required for 18 holes varies: 3 hours for the premium option, 2 hours for the standard option, or 1 hour for an express option.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is described as family-friendly and suitable for various events, including birthday parties.
